narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Massive investment in AI chips and data center connectivity is driving significant momentum in the semiconductor and enterprise software sectors.

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: Positive clinical trial results for new oral and injectable weight-loss treatments are reinforcing the growth narrative for pharmaceutical leaders.

narratives.name: Energy and Inflationary Pressure
narratives.thesis: Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East are driving up oil prices, providing a tailwind for energy while rising inflation pressures broader markets.

narratives.name: Financial Sector Resilience
narratives.thesis: Major banks are demonstrating strength and capital return potential despite macroeconomic uncertainty and inflation data.

narratives.name: Tech Sector Pullback
narratives.thesis: Accelerating inflation and rising interest rate concerns are driving a rotation out of high-growth technology stocks.

narratives.name: Crypto and Meme Volatility
narratives.thesis: Regulatory scrutiny and financing concerns are creating headwinds for speculative crypto and meme-driven assets.
